name: 宾果卡
desc:
①：选相同纵列全部有卡存在的1只怪兽，那个纵列的卡全部破坏。那之后，双方各自抽1张。
②：可以把墓地的这张卡除外，从以下效果选择1个发动。
●自己主要怪兽区域5只怪兽或者自己魔法与陷阱区域5张卡破坏。那之后，自己抽2张。
●对方主要怪兽区域5只怪兽或者对方魔法与陷阱区域5张卡破坏。那之后，对方抽2张。

name: Emissaries from Darkness
desc:
If you take battle or effect damage: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain 2000 LP, then you can apply 1 of these effects.
● Special Summon 1 "Emissaries from Darkness" from your hand, Deck, or GY.
● Destroy up to 2 Attack Position monsters your opponent controls.
During the End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: You can target 1 Trap in your GY; Set it. You can only use each effect of "Emissaries from Darkness" once per turn.

name: Father Grizzly
desc: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster with 1400 ATK from your Deck, or if you have 2 or more Level 4 monsters with 1400 ATK in your GY, you can Special Summon 1 Normal Monster instead. When your opponent activates a monster effect and you control a face-up non-Effect Monster (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that monster. You can only use this effect of "Father Grizzly" once per turn.

name: Myriaday Dragon
desc: Once per turn, during the End Phase: You can pay 100 LP; place 1 Myriad Counter on this card. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can place 1 Myriad Counter on this card for every 1000 points difference between your LP and your opponent's. Gains 10,000 ATK/DEF while it has 10 or more Myriad Counters. If this card would be destroyed by battle or card effect, remove 1 Myriad Counter from it instead.

name: Destratification Dino Stratiae
desc:
2 monsters, including a Dinosaur monster
If this card is Link Summoned: You can make this card gain ATK equal to half the total original ATK of the Dinosaur monsters used as its material. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its materials from your field and/or GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Dinosaur monsters. You can only use this effect of "Destratification Dino Stratiae" once per turn.

name: Hublot the Dark Directory of Death
desc: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hublot the Dark Directory of Death" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Level 6 or higher Zombie monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Hublot the Dark Directory of Death", then you can add 1 Level 6 or higher Zombie monster from your GY to your hand. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the GY while this card is in the Monster Zone, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 Zombie Xyz Monster.

name: Witness of the Ancient
desc: If you have a Synchro Monster in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can place up to 3 Synchro Monsters with different names from your Extra Deck and/or GY in your Spell & Trap Zone as face-up Continuous Spells, and Special Summon 1 "Arc Token" (Machine/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0) with a Level equal to the number placed, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use each effect of "Witness of the Ancient" once per turn.

name: Distrust Paranoia
desc:
Take control of all your opponent's monsters in this card's column. If this Set card in its owner's control has left the field by an opponent's effect, and is now in the GY or banished: You can Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Fiend/DARK/Level 10/ATK 4000/DEF 4000) with the following effect (this card is NOT treated as a Trap).
● Unaffected by your opponent's card effects activated in the same column.
You can only activate 1 "Distrust Paranoia" per turn.

name: Yomagna the Fire Phantom
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by shuffling 3 cards of the same type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from your GY into the Deck/Extra Deck. If this card is Special Summoned: You can declare 1 Monster Type; this card becomes that Type until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck using monsters on either field, including this card. You can only use each effect of "Yomagna the Fire Phantom" once per turn.

name: Thundercrash Snarecrow
desc: Each time a non-Thunder monster(s) is Special Summoned face-up, while this card is in the Monster Zone: That monster(s) cannot attack this turn, also destroy it during the End Phase. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 face-up card you control; destroy it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Thundercrash Snarecrow" once per turn.

name: Mixousia the Confounder
desc:
1 Spellcaster monster + 1 non-Spellcaster monster
You can target 1 face-up monster on the field and declare 1 Attribute; it becomes that Attribute. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing this card you control and monsters from your field or GY as material. If this card is in your GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Mixousia the Confounder" once per turn.

name: Shamanite Shamanknight
desc:
2+ Level 3 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned, or if a Trap you own is banished: You can target 1 of your banished Traps; attach it to this card. You can detach any number of materials from this card, then target 1 DARK monster in your GY or banishment with a Level equal to the number detached; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Shamanite Shamanknight" once per turn.

name: Cerynemesia, Mystical Beast of the Forest
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can banish (face-up) 1 Beast monster from your hand or face-up field until the End Phase; Special Summon 1 EARTH Beast monster from your Deck or GY, with an equal or lower Level than that monster's original Level, then your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster from their hand. You can only use this effect of "Cerynemesia, Mystical Beast of the Forest" once per turn. Your opponent's monsters that can attack must attack the monster you control with the highest ATK (their choice, if tied).

name: Imposter Shift
desc: When a monster effect that was activated on your opponent's field by targeting a card(s) on the field resolves, if any of those targets are in a different column than that opponent's monster, they can banish 1 card from their GY. If they did not, negate the activated effect. You can banish 1 monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Imposter Token" (Psychic/EARTH/ATK 800/DEF 800) with the same Level as that monster. You can only use this effect of "Imposter Shift" once per turn.

name: Mortilux Heruvur
desc:
2+ Level 8 monsters
If a monster(s) is sent to your opponent's GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; attach it to this card. You can only use this effect of "Mortilux Heruvur" once per turn. This card gains effects based on the number of materials attached to it.
● 2+: Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
● 3+: Your opponent cannot target cards in the GYs with card effects.
● 4+: You can detach 3 materials from this card; send 1 monster on the field to the GY.

name: Angelechy Shatranga
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it. If this card is placed in the Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell: You can add 1 "Angelechy" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use each of the preceding effects of "Angelechy Shatranga" once per turn. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell, your opponent can only attempt to activate up to 5 monster effects per turn.

name: Angelechy Bastion
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
You can target 1 other card in this card's column; banish it. If this card is placed in the Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell: You can place 1 "Angelechy Shatranga" from your Extra Deck in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. You can only use each of the preceding effects of "Angelechy Bastion" once per turn. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell, other "Angelechy" cards on the field cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

name: Angelechy Destrier
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
You can target 1 monster in another column; banish it. If this card is placed in the Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell: You can add 1 "Angelechy" Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each of the preceding effects of "Angelechy Destrier" once per turn. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell, each time your opponent activates a card or effect, inflict 500 damage to your opponent when it resolves.

name: Angelechy Enlisted
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner
You can target 1 opponent's monster in this card's adjacent column; banish it, then change control of this card by moving it to one of your opponent's Main Monster Zones in this card's adjacent columns. If the control of this face-up card changes: Return this card to the Extra Deck, then the owner of this card Special Summons 1 "Angelechy" monster from their Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Angelechy Enlisted" once per turn.

name: Angelechy Problem
desc: Once per turn: You can discard 1 Spell/Trap; Special Summon 1 Level 2 "Angelechy" monster from your Extra Deck, and if you do, place 1 "Angelechy" monster from your Extra Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. If a face-up "Angelechy" Monster Card(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can return 1 "Angelechy" Monster Card you own from your Spell & Trap Zone to the Extra Deck, then you can Special Summon it.

name: Angelechy Disturbance
desc: Give control of 1 "Angelechy" monster you control to your opponent (until the End Phase), then if your opponent controls a face-up card(s) in its adjacent Monster Zones and/or Spell & Trap Zones, their effects are negated. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Angelechy" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Angelechy Disturbance". You can only use each effect of "Angelechy Disturbance" once per turn.

name: Angelechy Opening to e4
desc: If your opponent goes first, you can also activate this card from your hand during the Standby Phase of their first turn. Place 1 "Angelechy" Field Spell from your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up on your field, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 2 or 7 "Angelechy" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone, and if you do that, place 1 "Angelechy" monster from your Extra Deck in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. Until the end of your next turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters.

name: Helping Robo for Underwater Combat
desc:
2 Machine monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it, also this card, then you can Special Summon 1 non-WATER Machine monster with 1600 or less ATK from your GY. If this card is banished: You can add 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Helping Robo for Underwater Combat" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except Machine monsters.

name: Mind Mirror Force
desc:
If your opponent controls 5 or more face-up cards, this card's activation and effect cannot be negated, also you can activate this card the turn it was Set. At any of the following timings: Negate the effects of as many face-up cards your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, destroy them, also your monsters cannot attack directly until the end of the next turn after this card resolves.
● When the monster your opponent controls with the highest ATK (even if tied) declares an attack.
● When your opponent activates a monster effect that would destroy a card(s) on the field.
● When your opponent activates a monster effect in the hand or field during your turn.

name: Ancient Secrets
desc:
Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your hand, Deck, or GY in Defense Position (if you Special Summon from the Deck, it must be Level 4 or lower), or if you control a Normal Monster Card, you can apply 1 of these effects instead.
● Destroy all monsters your opponent controls.
● Destroy all Spells/Traps your opponent controls.
● Draw 2 cards.
● Special Summon 1 monster from either GY to your field.
You can only activate 1 "Ancient Secrets" per turn.

name: Spatial Trunade
desc: Return up to 2 cards on the field to the hand, then each player places cards from their hand on the bottom of the Deck in any order equal to the number returned to their hand. You can only activate 1 "Spatial Trunade" per turn.

name: Akasuna the Battle Ashtra
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Akasuna the Battle Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Akasuna the Battle Ashtra" once per turn. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Trap from your hand or face-down field to the GY; change all face-up monsters your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position. During your End Phase: You can Set 1 "Ashtra" Trap from your Deck.

name: Kuzuha the Bewitching Deity Ashtra
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Kuzuha the Bewitching Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Kuzuha the Bewitching Deity Ashtra" once per turn. You can target up to 1 card on the field for every 2 face-down cards on the field; destroy them. During your End Phase: You can target 1 "Ashtra" Trap in your GY; Set it.

name: Yoa the Plague Deity Ashtra
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Yoa the Plague Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Yoa the Plague Deity Ashtra" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can Set 1 "Ashtra" Spell/Trap from your Deck. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; increase or decrease its Level by 1.

name: Mikumari the Sealing Deity Ashtra
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Mikumari the Sealing Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Mikumari the Sealing Deity Ashtra" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 non-Wyrm "Ashtra" monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material for an "Ashtra" monster: You can target 1 Normal Trap in your GY; Set it.

name: Ashtraja Susanoo
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can banish any number of Traps from your GY; banish that many cards on the field. During the End Phase: You can target up to 2 "Ashtra" monsters and/or "Ashtra" Traps in your GY and/or banishment; for each of them, add it to your hand or Set it, then if you targeted 2 cards, return this card to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Ashtraja Susanoo" once per turn.

name: Ashtraya Mikumari-no-Mikoto
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Ashtra" card from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, send 1 card on the field to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Ashtraya Mikumari-no-Mikoto" once per turn. If your opponent activates a monster effect: You can target 1 "Ashtra" Trap in your GY or banishment, or if there are 3 or more face-down cards on the field, you can target 1 Trap in your GY instead; Set it.

name: Ashtrashen - Gateway to the Worlds Beyond
desc: You can target any number of face-down cards you control; add "Ashtra" cards from your Deck to your hand with different names from each other, except Field Spells, equal to the number of those targeted cards that are still face-down, then send those face-down cards to the GY. If a card(s) becomes Set on the field, while you control an "Ashtra" monster and a face-down card: You can target 1 card on the field; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Ashtrashen - Gateway to the Worlds Beyond" once per turn.

name: Ashtra Insect Poison
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Insect/Tuner/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) (this card is NOT treated as a Trap), then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster.
● Target 1 "Ashtra" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
You can only activate 1 "Ashtra Insect Poison" per turn.

name: Ashtra Cursed Roar
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Spellcaster/Tuner/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) (this card is NOT treated as a Trap), then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster.
● If you have an "Ashtra" monster in your field or GY: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it.
You can only activate 1 "Ashtra Cursed Roar" per turn.

name: Ashtra Divine Domain
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Aqua/Tuner/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) (this card is NOT treated as a Trap), then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster.
● When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect and they control no face-down cards: Negate that effect.
You can only activate 1 "Ashtra Divine Domain" per turn.

name: Leviathan of Atlantis - Daedalus
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Leviathan of Atlantis - Daedalus" once per turn. If you control "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" or "Umi": You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send up to 3 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; add that many cards that mention "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your Deck to your hand, except Level 7 monsters, then you can send 1 card on the field to the GY.

name: General of Atlantis
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "General of Atlantis" once per turn. You can discard this card; add 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY and you control "Umi": You can Special Summon this card.

name: Monstrous Arms of Atlantis
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Monstrous Arms of Atlantis" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster in your GY that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon"; Special Summon it in Defense Position. When your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY and send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; negate that effect.

name: Fiendish Vortex of Atlantis
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Fiendish Vortex of Atlantis" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 card that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your Deck to the GY, except "Fiendish Vortex of Atlantis". If this card is sent to the GY and you control "Umi": You can Special Summon 1 WATER monster from your hand.

name: Azure Ocean Dragon Lord - Neo-Daedalus Rage
desc:
4 monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can Special Summon up to 3 monsters that mention "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your GY to your zones this card points to, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn. This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; send all cards on the field to the GY, except "Umi".

name: Levia-Dragoon - Daedalus
desc:
3 WATER monsters
This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Levia-Dragoon - Daedalus" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your Deck. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; discard your opponent's entire hand, and if you do, they draw the same number of cards. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

name: Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon
desc: While a monster that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" is on the field, reduce the Levels of all monsters in both players' hands and fields by 1. If you Link Summon a "Daedalus" monster, you can reduce the material requirement listed on it by 1 and Link Summon it with 1 less material. If this card is in your GY and you control "Umi": You can place this card face-up on your field. You can only use this effect of "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" once per turn.

name: Atlantis Call
desc: Add 1 monster that mentions "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your Deck to your hand, then if you control "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon", you can negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls until the end of this turn. If you control "Umi": You can banish this card from your GY; all WATER monsters you currently control gain 500 ATK/DEF. You can only use each effect of "Atlantis Call" once per turn.

name: Advent of Atlantis
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Advent of Atlantis" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can place 1 "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" or "Umi" from your Deck face-up in your Field Zone. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 Level 7 Sea Serpent monster from your Deck to your hand.

name: Daedalus Maelstrom
desc: When your opponent would Normal or Special Summon a monster(s) while you control "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon": Negate the Summon, and if you do, destroy that monster(s), then if you control a WATER Link Monster, you can destroy all non-WATER monsters on the field. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use 1 "Daedalus Maelstrom" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

name: Adamancipator Conductor
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can place 1 other "Adamancipator" card from your hand on top of the Deck; Special Summon this card. During your Main Phase: You can excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck, and if you do, you can Special Summon 1 excavated Level 4 or lower Rock monster, also place the rest on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Conductor" once per turn.

name: Adamancipator Crystal - Tiamite
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by an "Adamancipator" card's effect: You can add 1 "Adamancipator" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Adamancipator Crystal - Tiamite", then you can Special Summon 1 Rock monster from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Rock Synchro Monster in your field or GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Tiamite" once per turn.

name: Adamancipator Risen - Tiamite
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If you have a DARK monster in your GY: You can add 1 "Adamancipator" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field (Quick Effect): You can excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck, and if you do, you can return cards your opponent controls to the hand, up to the number of excavated Rock monsters, also place the excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Risen - Tiamite" once per turn.

name: Adamancipator Luminous
desc:
2 Effect Monsters, including a Synchro Monster
If this card is Link Summoned, or a monster(s) is Special Summoned to a zone(s) this card points to: You can target 1 monster in your field or GY that has a Level; Special Summon 1 "Glimmer Token" (Rock/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level. When another monster on the field activates its effect (Quick Effect): You can place it on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Luminous" once per turn.

name: Adamancipator Mates
desc: Add 1 "Adamancipator" monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Mates" once per turn.

name: Swickelavee the Brilliantly Crowned Heavy Cavalry
desc:
2 Level 3 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Swickelavee the Brilliantly Crowned Heavy Cavalry" by using 1 Beast monster you control with 2000 or less ATK (transfer its materials). Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon. If this card destroys a monster by battle: Place 1 Crown Counter on it, then apply this effect based on the number of Crown Counters on it.
● 1: This card gains 400 ATK.
● 2: This card gains 600 ATK.
● 3: Return this card to the Extra Deck, and if you do, draw 3 cards.

name: Thoroughbred Elf
desc: During your Main Phase: You can send 1 Equip Spell from your Deck to the GY, then this card gains 500 ATK until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use this effect of "Thoroughbred Elf" once per turn. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add to your hand, or Special Summon, 1 Level 4 or lower LIGHT Spellcaster monster from your Deck, except "Thoroughbred Elf".

name: Assault Lion
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing 1 Beast-Warrior monster. If this card battles a monster, any battle damage it inflicts to your opponent is doubled. If a Beast-Warrior monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Tribute Summon this card face-up, and if you do, it gains 500 ATK, also banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Assault Lion" once per turn.

name: Power Connection
desc: Target any number of face-up monsters you control (if you target 2 or more monsters, they must have the same Type); they gain 500 ATK for each monster targeted, until the end of this turn. If you activated "Armament Reincarnation" this turn: You can add this card from your GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Power Connection" once per turn.

name: Witchcrafter Seed
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and you control a "Witchcrafter" monster other than "Witchcrafter Seed", or "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion": You can target 1 face-up card on the field; return it to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; reveal any number of cards in your hand, including a Spell, and shuffle them into the Deck, then draw that many cards. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Seed" once per turn.

name: Destiny HERO - Destro-Dogma
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by banishing 3 Warrior and/or DARK monsters from your GY. You can only Special Summon "Destiny HERO - Destro-Dogma" once per turn this way. If Summoned this way: You can activate this effect; inflict 2000 damage to your opponent during the next Standby Phase. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can Fusion Summon 1 DARK or Warrior Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck.

name: Destiny HERO - Doom Overlord
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it until the next Standby Phase. You can send 1 "Destiny HERO" monster from your Deck to the GY; add 1 "Clock Tower Prison" or "Dark City at Midnight" from your Deck or GY to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except DARK "HERO" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Destiny HERO - Doom Overlord" once per turn.

name: Destiny HERO - Dreadnought Servant
desc: If you control a "Destiny HERO" monster or a face-up Field Spell: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can destroy 1 card you control, and if you do, add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. If you Special Summon a Level 8 "Destiny HERO" monster(s): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; place it on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Destiny HERO - Dreadnought Servant" once per turn.

name: Destiny HERO - Dreadnought Master
desc:
2 Level 5 or higher "Destiny HERO" monsters
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by Tributing 1 "Destiny HERO - Dreadmaster". You can only Special Summon "Destiny HERO - Dreadnought Master" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 2 "Destiny HERO" monsters and/or cards that mention a "Destiny HERO" monster's card name from your Deck to your hand. This card's ATK becomes the total original ATK of all other "Destiny HERO" monsters in your field and GY.

name: Dark City at Midnight
desc: Each time you Special Summon a Level 8 or higher "Destiny HERO" monster(s): All Warrior monsters you currently control gain 300 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dark City at Midnight" once per turn. During your Main Phase, if this card was activated this turn: You can add 1 "Destiny HERO" monster, or 1 card that mentions a "Destiny HERO" monster's card name, from your Deck to your hand. If this card is destroyed: You can Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO" monster from your Deck (this is treated as a Special Summon with "Clock Tower Prison").

name: Swiftwind Panther Warrior
desc:
During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other monster from your hand or field, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your hand or Deck, except "Swiftwind Panther Warrior".
● Send 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck to the GY.
You can only use this effect of "Swiftwind Panther Warrior" once per turn. Cannot declare an attack unless a monster(s) was Tributed this turn.

name: Alligator's Dragon Knight
desc: Can attack directly. You can only use each of the following effects of "Alligator's Dragon Knight" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can reveal 1 other card in your hand that mentions "Dark Time Wizard"; Special Summon this card. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add up to 2 Spells/Traps with different names from each other that mention "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.

name: Jinzo - Energy Shocker
desc: This card's name becomes "Jinzo" while in the field or GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can destroy as many Traps your opponent controls as possible (if a card is Set, reveal it), then this card gains 300 ATK for each card destroyed this way. You can only use this effect of "Jinzo - Energy Shocker" once per turn. Your opponent cannot activate Trap Cards or effects while you have another monster in your field or GY that mentions "Dark Time Wizard".

name: Fisherman of Legend
desc: If your opponent activates a monster effect on the field, or when their monster declares an attack, and "Umi" or a card that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" other than "Fisherman of Legend" is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it, also return this card from the field to the hand during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Fisherman of Legend" once per turn.

name: Red-Eyes Black Dragon Exceed
desc:
"Red-Eyes Black Dragon" + 1 monster that mentions "Dark Time Wizard"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by Tributing 1 face-up monster on either field during the turn a monster(s) was destroyed by the effect of "Dark Time Wizard". You can only Special Summon "Red-Eyes Black Dragon Exceed" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 8 or lower monster from your hand or GY. Unaffected by your opponent's activated monster and Spell effects.

name: Dark Time Wizard
Graceful & Skull Dice
desc:
Roll a six-sided die twice and apply these effects for the rest of this turn.
● Monsters you control that mention "Dark Time Wizard" gain ATK/DEF equal to the total x 200.
● Monsters your opponent controls lose ATK/DEF equal to the total x 200.
If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card, then target 1 of those monsters; roll a six-sided die twice, and if the total is 6 or more, destroy that monster.

name: Sleepy Scapegoats
desc: Special Summon up to 4 "Scapegoat Tokens" (Beast/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon 1 "Swiftwind Panther Warrior" from your Deck, also for the rest of this turn, these Tokens cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Fusion Monsters. If a card(s) you control that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 Token you control that was Special Summoned by this effect instead.

name: Foolish Graverobber
desc: Send 1 card that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck to the GY, except "Foolish Graverobber", then you can Special Summon 1 monster from either GY to your field. You can banish this card from your GY; Set to your field, 1 Spell/Trap that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your GY, except "Foolish Graverobber", or 1 Spell/Trap from your opponent's GY. You can only use each effect of "Foolish Graverobber" once per turn.

name: Reversal Box
desc: Once per turn, during the Standby Phase: Roll a six-sided die and place counters on this card equal to the result (max. 6). When a monster effect is activated on your opponent's field, or once per battle, during damage calculation, if an opponent's monster attacks: You can remove 1 counter from this card, then target 1 of those monsters; toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, you can Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck, and if you do, until the end of this turn, change the targeted monster's ATK to 0, also its effects are negated.

name: Dark Tyranno
desc: Can attack directly if all monsters your opponent controls are in Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dark Tyranno" once per turn. During your Main Phase, if a Spell Card or effect was activated this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 Level 8 or higher Dinosaur monster from your Deck to your hand, then you can Special Summon it if your opponent controls a monster.

name: Arcana Force XII - The Hangman
desc:
When a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 "Arcana Force" monster from your hand in Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Arcana Force XII - The Hangman" once per turn. If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: Destroy 1 monster you control, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK.
● Tails: Destroy 1 monster your opponent controls, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its original ATK.

name: Candelato, the Beast of Light
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Phantom Beast" card.)
Gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each card in your hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Candelato, the Beast of Light" once per turn. You can discard 2 other cards; Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 card from your Deck to your hand that has a coin tossing effect. When a card or effect is activated that includes an effect that adds a card(s) from the Deck to the hand (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect.

name: Plasma Warrior Eitom
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Magna Warrior" card.)
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by Tributing 1 Level 7 or higher monster. You can only Special Summon "Plasma Warrior Eitom" once per turn this way. Once per turn: You can send 1 "Magnet Warrior" or "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Plasma Warrior Eitom"; for the rest of this turn, this card's original ATK becomes 1500, also it can attack directly.

name: White Knight Lord
desc:
You can banish 3 monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can apply 1 of these effects.
● Special Summon 1 "White Knight" or "White Night" monster from your hand or Deck.
● Add 1 "White Veil" from your Deck to your hand.
You can only use this effect of "White Knight Lord" once per turn. When an attack is declared involving this card and an opponent's monster: Change that opponent's monster's ATK to 0. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

name: Invincible Demise Lord
desc: During the End Phase, if a monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or GY, and if "Invincible Demise Lord" was destroyed by battle this turn, this card's original ATK becomes 3000, also it cannot be destroyed by card effects. During your Main Phase: You can reveal cards in your Deck, including "Slash Draw", equal to the number of cards your opponent controls +1 and place those revealed cards on top of the Deck in any order. You can only use each effect of "Invincible Demise Lord" once per turn.

name: Elemental HERO Clay Guardian
desc:
1 "Elemental HERO" monster + 1 Warrior monster
(This card is not treated as a "Guardian" card.)
If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Elemental HERO" monster from your Deck, then if your opponent controls a card, you can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "HERO" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Elemental HERO Clay Guardian" once per turn. Other "Elemental HERO" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.

name: Doll Hammer
desc: Target 1 monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 2 cards, then you can change the battle position of 1 monster your opponent controls. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from your GY while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doll Hammer" once per turn.

name: Quick Summon
desc: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon/Set 1 monster. When you do, if your opponent controls a monster, you can Normal Summon a Level 5 or higher monster without Tributing. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 5 or higher monster that can be Normal Summoned/Set from your Deck or GY to your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, Tribute Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Quick Summon" once per turn.

name: D - Burst
desc: Target 1 face-up Spell you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 1 card, then if you control a "Destiny HERO" monster, you can Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO" monster from your hand, GY, or banishment. At the end of the Damage Step, if a monster equipped with an Equip Card, or "Destiny HERO - Dogma", attacked: You can banish this card from your GY; that monster can make a second attack in a row. You can only activate 1 "D - Burst" per turn.

name: Clown Crew Cappello
desc:
Pendulum Scale = 7
[ Pendulum Effect ]
During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Clown Crew" card from your Deck to your GY, except a Pendulum Monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot activate the effects of monsters Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck until the end of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "Clown Crew Cappello" once per turn.
----------------------------------------
[ Monster Effect ]
Monsters your opponent controls lose 1500 DEF while you control a Tribute Summoned monster. If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Clown Crew Cappello" once per turn);
● Shuffle all Pendulum Monsters on the field and face-up in the Extra Decks into the Deck.
● Special Summon 1 non-Pendulum "Clown Crew" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

name: The Magical King of Dimension Zeta
desc: An observer from an empty world. They survey everything in the universe through every distortion in space and time. Take care. If you gaze long into your dreams, Zeta also gazes into you.
